name: Macaroon Ice Cream Delight
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Almond macaroons (fresh, moist; mound type)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Crumble macaroons by hand onto 2 large cookie sheets. Bake in a 400°F oven for 10 minutes, tossing occasionally until golden brown. Let cool. Melt the ice cream to a semi-soft consistency. Place the melted ice cream in a large bowl. Add the macaroon crumbs and mix thoroughly. Add the bourbon and mix thoroughly. Refreeze the mixture immediately in two half-gallon containers. Serve frozen.
